title: R5 district (flat-roof envelope) - required setback depth above the base height
description: DRAFT extraction (needs_review) of the required SETBACK DEPTH above the R5 base height for the flat-roof envelope per NYC Zoning Resolution section 23-423 (with the wide/narrow street definition in section 12-10; City of Yes, Last Amended 2024-12-05). The setback depth is CONDITIONAL on street-width class: at least 10 ft from a street wall on a WIDE street (>= 75 ft, section 12-10), at least 15 ft on a NARROW street (< 75 ft). This is a SEPARATE typed constraint from the base/building heights (rule r5-height). FAIL-CLOSED INPUT: the canonical property_profile exposes NO street-width / frontage field, so street_width_class is a REQUIRED input with no canonical source; when it is missing/unavailable the evaluation returns professional_review_required with NO computed setback depth - a value predicated on street width is never emitted from a guessed class. NOT a Verified determination.

citations.quote: A setback shall be provided in accordance with this Section. The depth of the setback shall be at least 10 feet from a street wall fronting on a wide street, and at least 15 feet from a street wall fronting on a narrow street.
A wide street is a street that is 75 feet or more in width. A narrow street is a street that is less than 75 feet in width.
At a height not higher than the maximum base height, a setback shall be provided in accordance with Section 23-423.

inputs.name: zoning_district
inputs.description: Residence district governing the lot. Applicability equals R5 (via in_set); R5A/R5B/R5D are NOT matched (R5A uses pitched-plane geometry, R5B/R5D have no 23-423 setback in the source).

inputs.name: street_width_class
inputs.description: Wide (>= 75 ft) or narrow (< 75 ft) street per section 12-10. REQUIRED and FAIL-CLOSED: no canonical property_profile field exposes street width, so in practice this is unavailable and the evaluation returns professional_review_required with no value. The setback depth is never computed from a guessed street class.

inputs.name: overlay_present
inputs.description: True iff zoning.commercial_overlays[] is non-empty; when true -> professional_review_required (section 23-44).

inputs.name: special_district_present
inputs.description: True iff zoning.special_districts[] is non-empty; when true -> professional_review_required (section 23-44).

outputs.name: required_setback_depth
outputs.description: Minimum required setback depth (ft) above the base height, selected by street-width class (10 wide / 15 narrow). Separate typed constraint; not a buildable-envelope result.

parameters.name: setback_depth_by_street_class
parameters.note: Minimum setback depth in feet by street-width class per section 23-423 (wide 10 ft, narrow 15 ft). Candidate values pending raw-HTML verbatim verification and G6 approval.

steps.note: Select the minimum setback depth for the street-width class (section 23-423).

exceptions.description: A commercial overlay may modify the setback (section 23-44); the citywide value is not emitted as final. Professional review required.
A mapped special district may modify the setback (section 23-44); the citywide value is not emitted as final. Professional review required.

uncertainty_policy.note: An uncertain, split, sliver, or invalid M2-T013 geometric district assignment is never collapsed into a single definitive district: coverage downgrades to professional_review_required (or data_conflict).

limitations: Draft extraction pending raw-HTML source verification and G6 qualified-human legal approval; not a Verified determination.
The setback depth is street-width conditional and the canonical property_profile has no street-width field; without street_width_class the constraint fails closed to professional_review_required.
This setback applies ABOVE the 35 ft base height (rule r5-height); it does not restate the heights.
The section 23-423 depth values (10/15 ft) are the official-source-researcher reading pending byte-level raw-HTML verbatim confirmation.
